mainEntity.name: Deadlines for 2026 AI model updates affecting LA referrals?
mainEntity.text: Deadlines for 2026 AI model updates affecting LA referrals?

acceptedAnswer.text: No fixed deadlines; AI firms like OpenAI update quarterly. LA firms should refresh profiles bi-annually for recrawls.[2][3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Monitor OpenAI/Gemini changelogs. Post-update, directories reindex in weeks. LA trends fast—quarterly audits. Misses hurt in competitive markets. Proactive beats reactive.[2]
